subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath taught us that He is the sovereign Doer, Who doeth whatsoever He willeth and speaketh as He pleaseth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی علمنا بانه هو الفاعل المختار یفعل ما یشاء و ینطق کیف یشاء و
subcodes.subjects: @infallibility; sinlessness ['ismat], @wisdom [hikmat], @station of the Manifestation of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Quddus, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
